                      181.ShadowheartIllusion: No harm in clinging to optimism a little longer. If events turn against us, at least we'll know you can act. The Absolute isn't winning, one way or another.ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomShadowheart

                      23.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm on borrowed time anyway. But don't pull the pin until you have to, hey? We might still win the old fashioned way.
                      ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandom!Full-IllithidKarlach

                      2.Halsin: That orb can deliver us victory - but a sort that we would not live to enjoy. Let us at least see how we fare, and if all else fails... the option remains.ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomHalsin

                          83.No Speaker: (no line text)note: Avatar Gale casts a teleportation spell on his companions. A spiral of blue magic rises from the ground, enveloping them It grows in intensity, into a vortex. When it fades, they are gone. Gale turns to ascend the stalk.

                    81.Gale: If there is even the slimmest chance of success once we ascend, I wish to pursue it.

                    Metadata

                211.Player: Mystra will never forgive you for refusing her command. Can you live with that?!ORI_Gale_State_Met_ElminsterInWYR

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Global
                • ORI_Gale_State_Met_ElminsterInWYR {82b0cbde-1d3b-1f67-86a8-d05744462209} = False

                • •
                  12.Gale: If I live at all, it will be no thanks to her. She didn't even deign to speak to me herself. Let her burn with fury - I choose to live.END_BrainBattle_Knows_GaleDesiresToLive

                  Flags and Tags

                  settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player

                  107.Gale: There's no sense dwelling on such a future is locked behind the looming shadow of the Netherbrain. First, we must fight. Then we deal with the Crown.END_BrainBattle_Knows_GaleDesiresToLive

                    149.Gale: No. I can't give up... and I don't want this to be how I part from you. Let us at least try.

                    11.Gale: I'm too long in the tooth to play sacrificial lamb - sacrificial bearded goat, more like. I will not just give in to the orb. Not when I've made it this far.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0f98f3be-e114-4711-5f0f-0a5a5b1da331Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h764db7c1ge365g4001ga51ag20083bb66560Text UUID: 56c5653f-c7d6-4d86-b879-f3bf9d8bb6f8Timeline Phase Index: 100Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0f98f3be-e114-4711-5f0f-0a5a5b1da331Timeline Phase Duration: 10.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 788.97sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 4 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 4 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 4 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 4 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [788.97s-795.07s] | @ 790.54s | speaker 8 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [788.97s-795.07s] | @ 792.12s | speaker 8 | emotion unchanged | variation 4Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [788.97s-795.07s] | @ 793.48s | speaker 8 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [795.07s-799.78s] | @ 795.08s | speaker 8 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [799.78s-808.68s] | @ 799.78s | speaker 11 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1

                  47.Gale: Should circumstances become that dire, I will not hesitate. But I dearly hope that will not be necessary.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2bfc04f1-289d-b38f-8636-e64feeb35892Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h082255ccgc47ag4d75g8d1ega22535483000Text UUID: a52f7f4b-1c50-4061-b39a-4aac76a4bb3cTimeline Phase Index: 86Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2bfc04f1-289d-b38f-8636-e64feeb35892Timeline Phase Duration: 7.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 701.29sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 4 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 4 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 4 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 4 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [701.29s-709.07s] | @ 703.76s | speaker 8 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [701.29s-709.07s] | @ 706.09s | speaker 8 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [709.07s-712.23s] | @ 709.07s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1

                143.Player: You're certain, then. I won't try to force you to do otherwise. Let's keep going.END_BrainBattle_Knows_GaleDesiresToLive

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                • END_BrainBattle_Knows_GaleDesiresToLive {bcaacb2f-3e6b-bedf-01b2-c744fe2bc1cc} = True

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7db34513-3c75-12b7-ec05-bfa7107f9fb2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7f23b26egae61g4986ga277g705871eac950Text UUID: 0046130c-a54e-4f78-8eba-42efb9c77d01Show Once: True
                • +
                  182.Gale: I'm glad. It would be more than a touch awkward if you tried and I had to turn on you.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a234ef40-1400-305d-672f-0993ad981c2cSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h074ad9eagd134g4509gae54gca63bc0aaaacText UUID: dc8df5ac-d87d-48ff-bebe-854f41d3b7a9Timeline Phase Index: 16Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a234ef40-1400-305d-672f-0993ad981c2cTimeline Phase Duration: 5.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 197.76sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 4 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [197.76s-203.33s] | @ 199.7s | speaker 8 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [203.33s-209.93s] | @ 203.33s | speaker 11 | Fear (16)

                    272.Gale: That said, should the worst transpire, and we seem destined to fail... well, the orb remains an option. But I truly hope it does not come to that.

              147.Gale: And I would die in the process, just to win the favour of a goddess who scarcely cares for me. We discussed this at length - I thought you and I were of a similar mind.

                    87.Gale: I could simply tell you what you want to hear, then ascend by myself and seize the Crown anyway, you know.END_BrainBattle_Knows_GaleWishesToAscendAlone

                          257.Gale: You're right. The orb is the only way. All that's left for me to do is spirit you away to safety. Are you ready?

                          Metadata

                          • +

                    230.Gale: I thought I meant more to you than a sacrificial lamb. Clearly I was mistaken. I will not cast everything away, not when I know what's out there, almost within my grasp.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d323911d-cc2f-4bec-8563-11d41be92fe3Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hceafd487gc557g448cg9d9fgdd41a683f6e1Text UUID:                     • +
                      141.Gale: If the fight should turn against us, and we have no other option, then rest assured I shall unleash the orb. But I believe there is a much grander destiny in store for us.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7ae29385-315f-44df-1a05-55c05779f029Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hc0ddfe3cgd745g4a2egb307g43276fa0d78eText UUID: 6cbea0a1-d35b-401f-bc9f-b893009b4079Group ID: d323911d-cc2f-4bec-8563-11d41be92fe3Group Index: 1

          • +
            136.Player: Are you sure you want this crown? Look at the damage it's caused...

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 776d8ec3-74f2-0060-8cc5-ddb5a6140741Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hadcde9fcg4b84g4df6g9905g6cf43b316527Text UUID: 1a934b94-e9ef-4a9b-ad6b-beaf74aea1bcShow Once: True
            • +
              110.Gale: You urged me to this point, and now you falter? What would you have me do, sacrifice myself and hope that Mystra eulogises my ashes?

              Metadata

                      247.Gale: But... perhaps saving the day will suffice for now. A better world can always follow, so long as we survive.

                      Metadata

                    17.Gale: Your fears are misplaced - the Crown will lead to a better world for all. I cannot ignore that.

                    Metadata

      28.Gale: Can't you feel it? We're almost there.ORI_Gale_State_SwayedTowardsCrown!END_IllithidOptions_State_GaleWillingToDiec101c641-784d-da62-a0e1-140e2e2896b2!Avatar

      • See Node 213 (Gale) Once we ascend the Netherbrain's stem, we'll be in touching distance of the crown. Of reclaiming the powers of Karsus himself.
    • -

      • +
        205.Gale: I can end this now - stop the Absolute, and spare the city. The stage is set for my final act. Mystra's bidding. And the redemption that lies beyond.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb63fb12-5648-7a3e-bdae-151089bd3ceeSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h63a8c5bdgd6f4g4f10g8e51ga678cecc8f61Text UUID: 3838bae2-08ed-4fde-b908-69cc558cc15bTimeline Phase         • +
          187.Gale: You've brought me right where I need to be - I have no right to ask more of you. It's time I spirited you to safety, for this is a fate I must face alone.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8251393-8f2a-db19-365c-3529036cd04fSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hf508caacg09c8g4c7fga10fg87270cdb3cd1Text UUID: f9a1dddd-037a-41c8-ae0a-f96df19b3b42Group ID: bb63fb12-5648-7a3e-bdae-151089bd3ceeGroup Index: 1
          • +
            192.Player: I don't want to leave you.ORI_State_PartneredWithGale

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_State_PartneredWithGale {e008e20d-d642-42ed-9008-297b6273aa21} = True

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: adfb1f74-bbd7-577f-9676-20468b420fd0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h14361187g96d1g4083gb4bfga9683ceb028fText UUID: 69534dab-d1f9-4374-9b90-84dc33003791Show Once: True
            • +
              132.Gale: What's the alternative? I allow the Absolute to have its way? Die in vain along with all its victims? Or flee, and live on in shame?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72f72765-4d79-126a-ed30-3d1f4d57d0ddSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: he02f5e22gd3dcg4e1fgaa99g94f4021519d9Text UUID: 9a6f1966-d6a4-45cb-ac83-4fe08ef6f380Timeline Phase Index: 74Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 72f72765-4d79-126a-ed30-3d1f4d57d0ddTimeline Phase Duration: 8.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 600.1sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 4 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [600.1s-608.45s] | @ 602.12s | speaker 8 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [600.1s-608.45s] | @ 604.08s | speaker 8 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [600.1s-608.45s] | @ 606.58s | speaker 8 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [608.45s-613.32s] | @ 608.45s | speaker 4 | Fear (16)
              • +
                258.Gale: It's just a choice between two deaths. Quick and meaningful, or torturous and pointless.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ed7eea56-4915-86ec-b558-3b9d12b340f7Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hccc73b74ge553g4c90gb8c1g92423e610bd1Text UUID: d5ece05e-920b-420d-8056-9f5445cb2747Timeline Phase Index: 44Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ed7eea56-4915-86ec-b558-3b9d12b340f7Timeline Phase Duration: 6.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_03 (bc87e6ef-d384-47a0-8203-60a76982e835) @ 411.96sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 4 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [406.18s-411.96s] | @ 408.25s | speaker 8 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [406.18s-411.96s] | @ 410.31s | speaker 8 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [412.8s-418.94s] | @ 412.8s | speaker 8 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23
                • +
                  250.Gale: It's now, or never.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e756a1cd-35d3-f6b1-85e4-fae6eea1745dSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hfcb427aag9044g4916gb86dg3d46ef07c886Text UUID: 73722e5b-7b90-4ce8-a3cb-3882f1fdfbbdTimeline Phase Index: 46Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e756a1cd-35d3-f6b1-85e4-fae6eea1745dTimeline Phase Duration: 1.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 419.48s; COM_GALE_02 (qCam ots) (a63974a8-72c0-4708-9412-d3e63ad95dd3) @ 420.8sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 4 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 4 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 4 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 4 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsf
                  • +
                    8.Player: You know there's always another way.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0a44cf8c-9f05-2549-776c-aacc9594deecSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfa22053bg760eg439fg9ed0g64f09d3a41f8Text UUID: a172a0b3-bd29-4b87-9025-ac409cbe845fShow Once: True
                    • +
                      58.Gale: Always another way, yes - but not necessarily a better way.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36590535-b2aa-8898-f933-a333eddd6adfSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h08de15eeg5b6eg4ad8g8544g448f9d97e5f6Text UUID: cfd531c5-77db-4b55-b279-5e16f31a66d5Timeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 36590535-b2aa-8898-f933-a333eddd6adfTimeline Phase Duration: 6.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 871.95sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 4 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [871.95s-878.15s] | @ 873.75s | speaker 8 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [871.95s-878.15s] | @ 874.84s | speaker 8 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [871.95s-878.15s] | @ 876.76s | speaker 8 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [878.15s-879.9s] | @ 878.15s | speaker 9 | Fear (16)
                      • +
                        261.Gale: Please. For too long I've lived in fear of taking a host of innocents with me when I expired. Now at least I can be assured my demise will be saving them instead.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef56d263-89b2-aa6f-8e68-5390415eb59aSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h11f2bea1ge39cg4d7dg9da0gb305b2a08e8cText UUID: 2d651eb0-d711-4ba4-9e97-e54b258f713cTimeline Phase Index: 47Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef56d263-89b2-aa6f-8e68-5390415eb59aTimeline Phase Duration: 11.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_02 (qCam ots) (a63974a8-72c0-4708-9412-d3e63ad95dd3) @ 432.33sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 4 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [421.21s-432.33s] | @ 421.26s | speaker 8 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [421.21s-432.33s] | @ 423.39s | speaker 8 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [421.21s-432.33s] | @ 428.31s | speaker 8 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [421.21s-432.33s] | @ 431.01s | speaker 8 | Happy (2) | variation 2
                        • +
                          99.Player: No, Gale. We're going to end this together - and live to tell the tale.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5d6ef9ac-816d-3154-a746-36024b669e29Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf17b8d91g2529g483cg852dg1b68b9a0259eText UUID: 471f8baf-3766-4fdd-bba0-180fa9b4721bShow Once: True
                          • +
                            177.Gale: If you're mistaken, this could be the end of everything. We will be failing, right at the last hurdle.

                            • +
                              219.Gale: But... I only made it this far thanks to you. Who am I to question such sterling guidance now?

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c698773d-e266-16f5-a7db-74eb0924c50fSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h68bfbb38gcadag4cfbg9b09g09c9a90b0516Text UUID: 27da31c2-cfe6-44da-bb73-856ab4570e65Group ID: 9f344c6f-53ce-fef0-96f9-d5a026a278cdGroup Index: 1
                              • +
                                228.Gale: Mystra won't be pleased... but perhaps trying to please the gods is a fool's errand.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d16dca30-93bf-8e38-4811-d51e89e8f299Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hd6c0c23age0ffg4cc7gb508g3d1ac814a0a4Text UUID: ad1f77b1-1ae1-49e6-a403-91ed43af1d4dGroup ID: 9f344c6f-53ce-fef0-96f9-d5a026a278cdGroup Index: 2
                                • +
                                  176.Gale: Lead on, then. I shall stay my hand as long as I can - but if the tide of battle turns against us, remember I have the means to bring a swift end to this.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9eabd18f-9f49-fa8b-e453-38d364868796Speaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: hb0c85c10g6ed6g499dga55bgac721b3fa8f1Text UUID: 4efef7d4-98fe-42d9-bfe1-b6664b2f07b6Group ID: 9f344c6f-53ce-fef0-96f9-d5a026a278cdGroup Index: 3
                                  • •

                        • +
                          235.Player: I won't stand in your way, then. Farewell, Gale.ORI_Gale_State_VolunteeredToExplode

                              62.Gale: There's endless wonder out there. Infinite possibilities. Perhaps fate will bring us back together, before the universe dims.

                                  55.No Speaker: (no line text)note: A spiral of blue magic rises from the ground, enveloping the player. It grows in intensity, into a vortex. Player's POV: one last glimpse of Gale smiling sadly, before the blue magic swallows his image...

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagCinematicUUID: 354ef270-816e-d1a7-7425-62b065410a3bSpeaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex, endnode
                  • +
                    91.Player: What about all we shared together? Are you just going to give up?

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5067515a-9de9-2faf-8364-bbf5670bc581Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4cb69bcdg77cfg4587gb231g3b860ec6be39Text UUID: aa8a0caf-bd03-47b3-a93d-831aa085045cShow Once: True
                    • +
                      53.Gale: This isn't giving up it's securing victory, at a price I am willing to pay. And everything we shared can live on - with you.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3496f17a-5451-d8ca-90df-abee0f0f7b4aSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: h4a24e569g032dg40d9g9fc6g143efe314ebdText UUID:                       • See Node 261 (Gale) Please. For too long I've lived in fear of taking a host of innocents with me when I expired. Now at least I can be assured my demise will be saving them instead.
                  • +
                    169.Player: No, we can ascend together and put an end to this. Should it look like we'll fail... that's your moment.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 96b9ed5e-d2bf-e823-5506-92cd1a42af07Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3e792f96g008eg4920ga561g6dfb8f8e8748Text UUID: 6a9effd6-5af5-4f49-a0a6-a93179d116f8Show Once: True
                    • +
                      7.Gale: You'd be dying in vain. I don't need company to sacrifice myself.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08a2ad56-33ad-5ff5-d17d-b23b6f792d5aSpeaker: 8 (Gale)Text Handle: ha317af69gfa89g4a5cgb6f3g377220971c9fText UUID: 7e777148-e6d3-4d83-ba5e-807b6da16e68Timeline Phase Index: 98Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 08a2ad56-33ad-5ff5-d17d-b23b6f792d5aTimeline Phase Duration: 5.28sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Stage Changes: COM_GALE_01.5 (4775c0d7-d91d-4223-87ce-057c47fbdf5d) @ 774.46sTimeline Material 1 Group ID: efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\efbf58d1-dbba-4cff-9f14-c31e45c5a6f4.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine_patch6\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\34a05e2a-e15c-4f46-acff-993360d60230.lsf.lsxTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: 5a13a407-526f-7e8c-534a-e346f0982779Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_OverlayMaterial_Cinematic_Gale_HandFX_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\OverlayMaterial\VFX_OverlayMaterial_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_Preskinned_Mask_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8eaTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e9e233ae-0d86-4439-9ca3-2f940897a8ea.lsfTimeline Material 4 Group ID: f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67bTimeline Material 4 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f13741f0-0ba7-4eb3-98b7-b33277edd67b.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [774.46s-779.74s] | @ 776.87s | speaker 8 | Pain (2048) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [779.74s-788.04s] | @ 779.74s | speaker 8 | Sad (32)

                    32.Player: If this is truly what you want...ORI_Gale_State_VolunteeredToExplode

                    • ORI_Gale_State_VolunteeredToExplode {9b9ccc0d-a4e0-41f9-bc4f-b6e706111fef} = True

                      90.Gale: What I want? Perhaps not... But what I need? I believe so. But it may not be the last turn of the page, even if it seems so.

      • See Node 205 (Gale) I can end this now - stop the Absolute, and spare the city. The stage is set for my final act. Mystra's bidding. And the redemption that lies beyond.

      52.Narrator: (no line text)note: |You grab onto the tentacle, pulses of mocking noise burst through your mind. You push through, take a firm grip and make your ascent.|
